attacking_style: Opportunistic late-race attacks from reduced groups after climbs have eliminated sprinters. Capitalizes on selection made by stronger climbers rather than initiating the decisive move himself.
team_tactics: Minimal data on team setup. Appears to position for opportunities created by other teams' aggressive racing rather than controlling through domestique support.
terrain_preference: Hilly finishes that eliminate pure sprinters but don't require elite climbing ability. Best in reduced bunch scenarios with 10-30 riders after selective climbs.
vulnerability: Likely exposed on sustained steep climbs against pure climbers, and in mass sprints against specialists. Needs pre-selection by others to compete for victory.
key_patterns: Wins from small breakaways formed late in race after climbers create selection
Exceptional early-season form in 2018, vastly exceeding typical annual win rate
Exploits opportunities rather than forcing race through personal firepower
form_trajectory: positive: Five wins by early March 2018 versus typical 2-3 annually indicates career-best form and extended peak period
